mapper.select: SELECT record_date AS date, COALESCE(SUM(calories_burned), 0) AS calories_burned, COALESCE(SUM(steps), 0) AS steps, COALESCE(SUM(duration_min), 0) AS duration_min FROM sport_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date >= #{startDate} AND record_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY record_date ORDER BY record_date ASC

SELECT record_date AS date, COALESCE(SUM(total_calories), 0) AS calories_intake, COALESCE(SUM(total_protein), 0) AS protein, COALESCE(SUM(total_fat), 0) AS fat, COALESCE(SUM(total_carb), 0) AS carb FROM diet_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date >= #{startDate} AND record_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY record_date ORDER BY record_date ASC
SELECT weight_kg FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT updated_at FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
